message:
fix(test): Add SafeOriginalDir for robust cwd handling in CI

Adds SafeOriginalDir RAII guard to safely save and restore the working
directory in tests. On macOS CI (GitHub Actions), the original working
directory may become inaccessible, causing std::env::current_dir() to fail.

The new guard:
- Captures the current directory if accessible
- Falls back to a temp directory if current_dir() fails
- Automatically restores cwd on drop
- Gracefully handles restoration failures during cleanup

This fixes test failures on macOS CI where directory access is restricted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
